LightningComponentBundle.description: A primary button component with a save icon that follows SLDS 2 design system patterns. Displays a branded button with customizable label and icon position.

property.name: buttonLabel
property.label: Button Label
property.description: The text label displayed on the button

property.name: iconPosition
property.label: Icon Position
property.description: Position of the icon relative to the label (left or right)

property.name: disabled
property.label: Disabled
property.description: Determines if the button is disabled
